# Instant Plumbing — Louisville, KY
> Licensed master plumber serving Louisville, KY and surrounding areas. Same-day service, flat-rate pricing, residential and commercial plumbing.

## Business
- Name: Instant Plumbing
- Phone: (502) 747-9052
- Website: https://instantplumbingky.com
- License: Kentucky Master Plumber
- Service radius: 30 miles from Downtown Louisville, KY
- Hours: Same-day available, emergency service 24/7

## Services
- [Drain Cleaning](https://instantplumbingky.com/drain-cleaning) — Hydro-jetting and snaking for kitchen, bathroom, and main sewer lines
- [Hydro Jetting](https://instantplumbingky.com/hydro-jetting) — Commercial-grade high-pressure jetting (up to 4,000 PSI) for residential main drains, sewer laterals, root intrusion, and commercial grease lines
- [Water Heater Repair](https://instantplumbingky.com/water-heater-repair) — Repair and replacement, all brands, same day
- [Emergency Plumbing](https://instantplumbingky.com/emergency-plumbing) — Burst pipes, flooding, gas line issues
- [Leak Detection](https://instantplumbingky.com/leak-detection) — Electronic leak detection, slab leaks, hidden pipe leaks
- [Toilet Repair](https://instantplumbingky.com/toilet-repair) — Running toilets, clogs, full replacement
- [Faucet Repair](https://instantplumbingky.com/faucet-repair) — Dripping faucets, fixture replacement, pressure issues
- [Commercial Plumbing](https://instantplumbingky.com/commercial-plumbing) — Restaurants, offices, multi-unit, new construction, MSA available

## Pricing
- Diagnostic visit: $79 (waived with repair)
- Drain cleaning: $150–$400
- Water heater replacement: $900–$1,800
- Emergency service: flat-rate, no after-hours surcharge
- Commercial MSA: pre-agreed NTE rates available

## Trust Signals
- Licensed Kentucky Master Plumber
- Fully insured
- 4.9 star rating (200+ reviews)
- Flat-rate pricing — price given before work begins
